detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 時事英文 (English for Current Events)	開課班級 : 華文一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 楊惠玲	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course aims to provide students with the opportunity to develop global views via various ways including news readings and podcast listening. Guidance for using AI tools to help English learning will be given; yet the ability to use English independently is highly emphasized. Also covered is advice on how to learn English more effectively. Students will be able to produce an English presentation related to their current lives at the end of the semester. 


2.教學綱要
Students will be guided to read local and global news of various types. Visual aids such as video clips may serve as complimentary materials. Quizzes and homework assignments are designed to evaluate students’ learning progress. Students will also be given opportunities to show their understanding of subject materials via individual and group presentation throughtout the semester.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
quizzes: 45%; presentations: 20%; homework assignments: 30%; participation: 15% 
Unless otherwise addressed, no personal electronic devices are allowed in class. 
Being absent for three times before the midterm may result in an early warming. Once the number of absence reaches six, no final exam (including other assignments) can be given to the student.
